_meta._note: Page-level headers + shared loading state. Inner page bodies still contain English literals; tracked for follow-up PR.

tracker.eyebrowYtdMonths: YTD — {year} · {count, plural, one {# MONTH LOGGED} other {# MONTHS LOGGED}}

annual.footnote: {count} line items from the Fortnox annual report. No monthly breakdown available — upload the monthly PDFs to see each month individually.

hero.singleFoodGap: {month} margin {pct} — but food cost is missing, so this isn't the real number.
hero.spread: YTD margin {avg}, but {worstMonth} crashed to {worstPct} vs {bestMonth} at {bestPct}.
hero.ytdSimple: YTD margin {avg} across {count, plural, one {# month} other {# months}}.
hero.ctxMonths: {count, plural, one {# month of data out of 12} other {# months of data out of 12}}
hero.ctxFoodGap: Food cost shows 0 kr — likely a sync gap, not a win
hero.ctxSwing: {pp}pp swing between best and worst month

ai.title: Let AI suggest budgets from your last year + forecasts

hero.missMonths: {onTrack} of {total} months on track — {month} missed by {amount}.
hero.ctxYtd: {pct}% of YTD revenue target delivered · {count} of {total} months logged
hero.ctxNoBudget: {count} of {total} months logged — budgets not set yet

coach.labourMsg: projected at {pct} — open Scheduling and trim next week's hours.

hero.noActualsYet: No actuals or forecast yet for {year}.
hero.loggedNoFc: {months} logged — no forecast generated yet for the rest of the year.
hero.weakMargin: Tracking to {revenue} revenue — {month} weak at {pct} margin.
hero.ctxNoFc: {count, plural, one {# month of actuals} other {# months of actuals}} · forecasts regenerate on the 1st of each month
hero.ctxActuals: {count, plural, one {# month actual ({profit} profit)} other {# months actual ({profit} profit)}}

performance.ctxNoData: Data syncs nightly at 06:00. Try a previous period or wait for the next sync.
performance.ctxNoOverheads: Overheads not yet loaded from Fortnox — waterfall shows `—`.
